g.text: A generated flow chart from app_flow.mmd showing UI actions, local database/process work, Polaris/external calls, and final response states.
No LOS | Idempotent write queue | Reconcile before retry | One reversal per jrno
User, staff, scheduler, POS or provider trigger
Local workflow, locking, tables, ledger and audit
Polaris core banking and external integrations
Admin saves active product configs transaction configs dynamic
field mappings and service pause rules
No Polaris call during save but values map to future prodCode
Config becomes active or operation is blocked if config
Create merchant_profiles pos_terminals merchant portal users
and planned passive settlement account records
Merchant becomes active only after terminal and Polaris
Save merchant passive and settlement accounts in
Create or register merchant passive and settlement account
BNPL invoices are allowed only when merchant status is
Registration, DAN, CIF, deposit, KYC and scoring
Create users customer_profiles otp_sessions message_logs and
Return OTP verified registration state or reject
Create user_sessions and update device login metadata
Return access token refresh token and active session or
Enable transaction authorization or lock revoke
Save dan_verifications and update customer identity
No Polaris call unless DAN success triggers CIF step
Continue to CIF creation on verified result or mark
Update customer_profiles with identity data and enqueue
Call cif/createPerson and if duplicate found search/update
Save polaris_cust_code and polaris_cif_status synced or
Store deposit acntCode set account active or
pending_reconcile if account result is unknown
Sync changed customer data to Polaris using cif/updatePerson
Set local KYC verified only when required local data and
Set relevant kyc_* rows rejected or kyc_verification_steps
If data was already synced then update Polaris customer status
Stop line activation and show rejected or manual review
Save hur_data_snapshots with raw response hash and extracted
External HUR service only no Polaris write
Use snapshots for scoring or mark score unavailable if
Save sain_score_requests with FICO sain score risk grade and
External Sain/FICO service only no Polaris write
Continue custom scoring or reject score if response is
final score custom score FICO score model version and grade
Return eligible ineligible or manual review decision
Limit creation, line account and line adjustment
Call cif/updatePerson with score risk grade model version and
Allow active limit only after sync succeeded or approved
Create or update loan_limits with max_total_limit product
limits utilized amount and status active
No Polaris write inside local limit creation
Customer can see offer only if KYC score deposit account
Create credit_line_accounts using active loan_limit customer
Store line acntCode in polaris_accounts and set
Update loan_limits and credit_line_accounts after risk refresh
Call line/adjustLineAccountLimit if line amount changes
Increase applies immediately; decrease below utilized
suspends new drawdowns instead of breaking existing
Create loan_applications draft then submitted with requested
amount term product and customer deposit account
Return validation errors if inactive KYC inactive
deposit inactive line expired limit or amount too high
Reservation, contract, child loan, schedule, link and grant
pos_transactions with merchant terminal and cart snapshot
Return QR to merchant POS if merchant terminal active
and invoice not duplicated or expired
Attach customer_id selected installment option and product
Continue to reservation if customer is eligible or
utilized_amount minus reserved_amount to prevent double
No Polaris write if rejected; approved proceeds to child loan
Rejected or cancelled releases reservation and returns
Proceed only when authorization is valid not expired and
Create loans row pending_core_setup and loan_core_steps
Store child loan acntCode in polaris_accounts or keep
Create loan_core_steps calculate_schedule and store calculated
Show final repayment terms or fail before grant if
Insert repayment_schedules only after Polaris schedule is
Set schedule_status succeeded only when local schedule
Grant is blocked until link confirmed succeeded
Create ledger_journals ledger_entries and update loans
Call loan/grantLoanNonCash from child loan account to customer
Store grant_polaris_jrno set loan active application
Set loan grant_status pending_reconcile and queue
account detail and deposit detail before retry
If matching jrno exists mark success; if no match retry
Run same child loan grant into customer deposit and set loan
Call loan/grantLoanNonCash from child loan account to customer
Do not approve POS yet because merchant passive transfer
Create merchant transfer ledger_journals and update
Call tllrcasa/internalCasaTransaction from customer deposit to
Set POS approved and loan active only after transfer
Create pos_terminal_callbacks with unique idempotency key and
External merchant POS callback approved rejected or timeout
Retry callback delivery without repeating loan grant or
Create qpay_repayment_invoices for loan schedule or manual
External QPay invoice creation if provider is used
Return payable invoice to customer or reject duplicate
QPay, inbound money, loan payment, allocation and close
Save qpay_repayment_callbacks and create or find
External QPay callback validation by payment id signature
Duplicate qpay_payment_id is ignored and invalid
Create inbound ledger_journal and set repayment_transactions
Call configured inbound transfer such as
tllrbac/transactionBacToCasa from bank or repayment pool to
Proceed to loan payment only after inbound jrno is
Create loan payment ledger_journal and update repayment
from customer deposit to loan account
Lock repayment_schedules rows and insert repayment_allocations
No additional Polaris write after loan payment unless
Update schedules pending partial paid and prevent
Update repayment_transactions completed and schedule partial
when payment is below outstanding amount
No extra Polaris call after confirmed loan payment
Show remaining due and next due date to customer
Reject or hold excess amount based on configured policy and
keep transaction pending manual review if needed
If money already moved query Polaris statement and create
Prevent paid amount from exceeding total due
Check all repayment_schedules paid and loan balance candidate
Proceed to close only when Polaris closing detail
Update loans closing state and create close ledger_journal if
Mark due unpaid repayment_schedules overdue and create
No Polaris call unless penalty must be synced or posted
Notify customer and include overdue state in reporting
Create repayment_cashback_records and wallet transactions when
Optional configured Polaris transfer if reward money moves to
Credit reward once only or mark failed pending retry
Settlement remains pending until finance approves or
Merchant settlement, refund, reversal and offsets
Create settlement ledger_journal and update settlement
Call configured merchant passive to settlement or bank
Set settlement completed with jrno or pending_reconcile
Create merchant_refund_requests and validate loan POS
No Polaris write until refund is approved
Reject invalid duplicate or over amount refund requests
Reverse merchant passive transfer then adjust or reverse loan
Call gen/doReverseTxn or gen/undoTransaction for original
merchant transfer jrno and related loan journals if required
Mark refund processed only when every dependency
Create settlement offset or reverse settlement first according
Call gen/doReverseTxn or gen/undoTransaction only once per
Create payable adjustment or reversed settlement item
and require finance review if ambiguous
Set source row and polaris_sync_queue to pending_reconcile not
account details using reference amount date account and
Resolve to success retry same key or dead_letter manual
Timeout recovery, daily reconcile, audit, ledger and API logging
Set source row failed and save error details in
No retry unless failure is classified retryable and no journal
Return deterministic failure message and release
Mark matched reconciled mismatched or dead_letter and
create audit logs for business impacts
Check service_pause_windows before repayment BNPL disbursement
Polaris sync settlement and ledger posting
Return retryable service paused response and do not
Read reporting views audit_logs ledger_journals repayment and
Optional Polaris statement query for finance report validation
export with actor and filter metadata
Create audit_logs only for business security financial status
Every status transition has one status_change audit row;
Create ledger_journals and ledger_entries for every grant
merchant transfer repayment close settlement refund and
Store Polaris jrno returned by money moving APIs
Ledger is financial fact table and reconciliation source
All Polaris write attempts are linked to polaris_sync_queue
Support replay diagnosis timeout resolution and audit
failed = confirmed failure; pending_reconcile = unknown Polaris result; dead_letter = unresolved after automated reconciliation; retries reuse the same idempotency key after journal/statement search.
